name: Feature request
about: Suggest a gameplay, UI, AI, or repository improvement
title: '[Feature] '

---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve, or what experience would it improve?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the expected behavior, UI, or workflow.

## Alternatives Considered

If you considered another approach, describe it here.

## Additional Context

Mockups, examples, references, or related notes.
